_OriginWork_note: All OriginWork subclasses are free-text — individuals are named from the KYM 'origin' field after platform names have been resolved. The classifier auto-assigns the specific subclass using keyword matching on KYM's standard parenthetical annotations (e.g. '(Television Series)', '(Film)'). hasOriginPerson must be assigned manually in Protégé — person names cannot be reliably detected automatically.

OriginWork._note: Catch-all for origin values that don't match any specific subclass. All subclasses below are subClassOf OriginWork.

_subclasses.OriginTVShow: TV shows, animated series, anime (matched by: 'Television Series', 'Animated Series', 'TV Show', etc.)
_subclasses.OriginFilm: Films and movies (matched by: '(Film)', '(Movie)', 'Animated Film', etc.)
_subclasses.OriginVideoGame: Video games (matched by: 'Video Game', '(Game)', 'Arcade Game', etc.)
_subclasses.OriginComic: Comics, manga, webcomics (matched by: 'Comic Strip', 'Webcomic', '(Manga)', etc.)
_subclasses.OriginMusic: Songs and music (matched by: '(Song)', 'Music Video', '(Album)', etc.)
_subclasses.OriginBook: Books and novels (matched by: '(Novel)', '(Book)', '(Short Story)', etc.)
_subclasses.OriginBoard: Imageboards and forum boards (matched by: /b/, /pol/, /v/ regex pattern)
_subclasses.OriginPerson: Individual creators or public figures — assigned manually in Protégé

CulturalReference._note: Free-text string — the name of the cultural entity being referenced. Not a controlled vocabulary; assigned manually in Protégé or via future extension.

FRBRLevel._note: FRBR (Functional Requirements for Bibliographic Records) entity level. All current Meme individuals in the OWL file are assigned hasFRBRLevel: Manifestation — they represent specific image files. The Work (abstract concept), Expression (a variant), and Item (a single copy) levels are defined in the schema for future use.
FRBRLevel._hierarchy: Work → Expression → Manifestation → Item  (each is rdfs:subClassOf the one above)

_meme_mapping.Work: The meme concept or template (e.g. 'Distracted Boyfriend' as an idea)
_meme_mapping.Expression: A specific language/variant version of the meme
_meme_mapping.Manifestation: A specific digital image file — this is what all current Meme individuals represent
_meme_mapping.Item: A single exemplar / copy of that image

_properties.hasFRBRLevel: Meme → FRBRLevel  (marks which FRBR level the individual occupies)
